events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessment complete. The scenario describes a missed stored-energy source (hydraulic/gravity/capacitor) during lockout/tagout — a critical LOTO failure under OSHA 1910.147, since stored/residual energy must be relieved, blocked, or dissipated in addition to isolating primary sources. I wrote a `fail` decision with `critical` risk, conditions `installed-defective` and `non-compliant`, and corrective actions (identify all energy types, bleed/block stored energy, verify zero-energy state before proceeding) to `/app/answer.json`.
